steps.description: Click the "How to develop agent for Teams?" card in the Microsoft Teams web app to select the prompt, "How can I develop agents with Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit?"
Press Enter to submit the message "How to develop agent for Teams?" in the chat input box of the vscuse_app_BKmhldev tab within Microsoft Teams (web interface).
Click the "Close" button (X) at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to exit the Microsoft Teams web app.
